raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX Card XXXX I am filing this complaint against American Express National Bank regarding their improper handling of a billing dispute under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). 

The disputed transaction is : Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX Amount : {$8500.00} Transaction date : XX/XX/XXXX Reference number : XXXX Account ending : XXXX I reported this charge to American Express because I did not receive the goods or services associated with this transaction. 

American Express initially issued a temporary credit while they investigated. However, in their letter dated XX/XX/XXXX, they stated that they contacted the merchant and determined that I am responsible for the charge. They then rebilled the full amount to my account. 

American Express did not provide any valid documentary evidence proving that I received any goods or services. They did not provide : Proof of delivery Signature confirmation Shipping records Contract or authorization Any verifiable evidence supporting the merchants claim Instead, their decision appears to rely solely on the merchants explanation.

I formally disputed this charge within the required time limits and also sent a written Notice of Claim requesting the evidence and a proper investigation. 

American Express has failed to conduct a reasonable investigation and failed to provide sufficient evidence as required under the Fair Credit Billing Act.

I am requesting that American Express : Provide all documentary evidence they relied on to deny my dispute Conduct a proper investigation Remove this charge permanently from my account This charge is invalid, and I am requesting regulatory assistance to resolve this matter. 

XXXX XXXX
